name: Wendy
subject: This is personal, and it's why I'm asking for your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Our most important FEC filing deadline of the campaign is at midnight tonight.
I'll get straight to the point, friend: Our most important FEC filing deadline of the campaign is at midnight tonight, and we're still $1,081 short of what we need to win.
I'm running for Congress to build a stronger future for my two granddaughters. It's personal. Whoever controls the House will decide the fate of families like yours and mine - and I sure as hell don't want extremist Republicans calling all the shots.
That's why I'm asking for your help to make up this shortfall. **Will you give $3 or more right now, before tonight 's critical FEC deadline, to flip Texas blue and expand our House majority?**
Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk5-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
Thank you,
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a87/704929dc/160af776/399393c9/1073890620/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a87/704929dc/160af776/399393c8/1073890620/VEsF/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a87/704929dc/160af776/399393cb/1073890620/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
As we prepare to ring in 2020 and the high-stakes election that comes with it, I've been checking in with my team about our end-of-year fundraising progress. We've still got about $10,000 left to raise to fund our plan for victory.
**New Hampshire is a swing state and our elections always come down to the wire -- I only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes. With just hours left in the year, there is no more critical deadline than tonight's.**
[**$3 or more from you -- right now -- will be instrumental in our plan to win here in the Granite State. That's why it's so important that I ask you: Will you please give $3 or more right now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc379/2a380d31/22cf317e/f0fc9c/1136156419/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTIzMV9FT1kyXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191231_EOY2_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Evi Steyer
subject: Our super pack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hey, there! I wanted to share some pics of three members of our family you may not know yet.
---
---
My dad’s campaign isn’t fueled by any corporate PACs, but we do rely on the support of a super pack of dogs: Zippy, Togo, and Kiwi. Home is home because these three cuddle around mom as she works and then madly dash to welcome my dad, whether he’s coming back from a week on the road in Iowa or one of his daily runs. Zippy is our oldest (he’s 105 in dog years!), and has been mistaken for a bear.
---
---
Togo is a Eurasier, like Zippy, and has a real talent for opening doors with his paws!
---
---
Kiwi is our 1.5-year-old pug who snores whether she’s asleep or awake.
---
---
Hope you have a safe and happy new year!
—Evi P.S. We’d love to see your cutest TeamTom buds — reply to this email with a pic or tweet it to [_**@TomHQ**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBghkyaowKH6yxjSCszLc-2F1YIrZNyI50oVhZxYCTukKVa_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfWuJc8i1okI4BqNVuUsSqOfRWqcHrm-2FxGOWUjqV6EYs7pKcMKCZUfmjfZ1zqk7CshneJPviFnL-2FYkaVW1SFQ0k8W-2FTvyzFLUvcL6ZmTnqGp4qTuvVj8T-2FKKLXUB5QwkgehymP9IGBmxdfUeGnq8HuCvRcQXvZcrDtqH487YY-2BiJl9-2FPxL-2Fa1T29tKE4XLfqZqhkuW8v8qIZfC7QXNav-2BXevlLxNfgFusE7U8D2rp5RBeRW0tWc2kNF1bcBG69hnND6LxaLnaJn8Nfnr0PRynBP0x5aQnYqfmiEcCL2coQjheYIdEqB8xtEFp4ON3MAtls5-2BQy4qbEormYSmVlPDVV1ecwWsph6fwRahUpUrllTQA-3D-3D).

clean_body: | | | | Hey, there! I wanted to share some pics of three members of our family you may not know yet. My dad’s campaign isn’t fueled by any corporate PACs, but we do rely on the support of a super pack of dogs: Zippy, Togo, and Kiwi. Home is home because these three cuddle around mom as she works and then madly dash to welcome my dad, whether he’s coming back from a week on the road in Iowa or one of his daily runs. Zippy is our oldest (he’s 105 in dog years!), and has been mistaken for a bear. Togo is a Eurasier, like Zippy, and has a real talent for opening doors with his paws! Kiwi is our 1.5-year-old pug who snores whether she’s asleep or awake. Hope you have a safe and happy new year! —Evi P.S. We’d love to see your cutest TeamTom buds — reply to this email with a pic or tweet it to . Thanks for your support, friend. We’re still looking for 447 more donors from Pennsylvania to make sure that Tom is on the January debate stage. Will you be a proud grassroots donor for Tom today? | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! subject: humbly asking one last time:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | This has been one of the most humbling years of my life. I'm about to reach my very first end-of-year deadline since announcing my race for Senate. [_**And my team just told me I only need 1 more gift from 18326 before midnight to MEET my goal, SHATTER our record, and WIN McConnell 's Senate. It would mean so much to me if you were the one to push me over the top. (Your generous gift will be 2X-matched for these final 4 hours) >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") When I led the charge to take back the House -- you were with me every step of the way. Now, as we enter the most important election year of our lifetimes -- I know we're going to take back the Senate together, too. There is no one I'd rather have by my side in this historic fight. I'm humbly asking one last time before we close out the year: [**Will you chip in $10 to ensure I start this election year off with an unbeatable foundation for victory?**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b4_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

I can't thank you enough for your trust and support,

Ben Ray

|

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b781/18e32a7f/50fe3b96/7b228ff6/637436311/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b781/18e32a7f/50fe3b96/7b228ff7/637436311/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b781/18e32a7f/50fe3b96/7b228ff4/637436311/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b781/18e32a7f/50fe3b96/7b228ff5/637436311/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b781/18e32a7f/50fe3b96/7b228fea/637436311/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b781/18e32a7f/50fe3b96/7b228feb/637436311/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

This is the last time I’ll email you before our FEC fundraising deadline in a couple hours. We’re just 151 donations short from reaching our end-of-quarter goal. Before we countdown to midnight tonight, will you chip in and be the one to finish the job fo | | | Hi friend,
This is the last time I’ll email you before our FEC fundraising deadline in a couple of hours. **[We’re just 151 donations short of reaching our end-of-quarter goal. Before we countdown to midnight tonight, will you chip in and be the one to finish the job for us?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.2y1/kXsmDSHeRuK3hOxl2-Tigw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwshTpr2jqGVHrquJIntRlUr5H5O-2BjuN73ZQg1O4IsZqE182m3fZV1EdVE6iNDOknRab80FpHZbkc8Hk-2FSemWBAZMtkWU84kc5ff6EXgo0MQsTTu8laCQZXi-2FSk5WdCMehR7ro-2FbA2oMG6aP5l-2BeK1nZVT8YMnaOGcL37W-2BPvDkFq4qPdMxsRjs3FEGPnkcv5qE-2FBKyO4GwhVvMVvZxix4IA-3D-3D/LSTs)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.2y1/kXsmDSHeRuK3hOxl2-Tigw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwshTpr2jqGVHrquJIntRlUr5H5O-2BjuN73ZQg1O4IsZqGLKRVS9bKRkWxEBez1XMSqGa5Jj5KI04QKXAz5mTghyTkqw2tUrFmWWCyDHlgM7VOC3htPhpo95LzeGvzmRpVwf2EHzFmigDVkx-2B4sxgKPs1U4u1gz41P5xA36JbPqe1LGI287j8nN1X0pWv6WnSS51ZfGW5-2F2yT2pvWNCjwDf5w-3D-3D/GME7) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BAE/ni0YAA/t.2y1/kXsmDSHeRuK3hOxl2-Tigw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwshTpr2jqGVHrquJIntRlUr5H5O-2BjuN73ZQg1O4IsZqHNMEGWcL6R8-2FVUhY1WDRdujJCyekUBJvljMDSFbtiPHxrQLGuofhoJzzjXxKQMaNWaDQ6aiC8PnOUpEGRsYy3nZLQXWarM7uoPGGnsT9zcceQBQ-2FEwwlNjXmnbwkuCOkAXh-2Bbyfi9Nj9z-2B2KjpF7cE-2Fzadzo1dEZApF5wY0nz2hw-3D-3D/izt0) When I look back on the past 3 months, it’s sometimes hard to believe this is all really happening. We took giant leaps in growing our campaign. We hired a Field Director, set up a new office, and made ambitious plans to take our work to the next level. Our campaign’s message is catching fire. More people attended our town halls, events, and meet & greets than ever before. Before we countdown to midnight tonight, will you chip in and be the one to finish the job fo | | | Hi friend, This is the last time I’ll email you before our FEC fundraising deadline in a couple of hours. When I look back on the past 3 months, it’s sometimes hard to believe this is all really happening. We took giant leaps in growing our campaign. More people attended our town halls, events, and meet & greets than ever before. We had hundreds of thousands of people watch & share our video ad. And it’s all thanks to you. body:

-Amy

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm asking for your help: Will you make a contribution of any amount before midnight tonight and help meet our critical end-of-year FEC goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I know in my heart that we'll be standing at the edge of a new democracy this time next year -- one that puts political and economic power in the hands of working people -- and getting there will... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bf4a/45c30650/1ea32382b/66fd2234/4264862764/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Bruce and I are spending New Year's Eve the same we always do -- watching Casablanca for the zillionth time with lots of good cheeses, snacks, and Bailey cuddled up between us.

Every time I watch it, Casablanca gives me hope.

It's a story about love, loyalty, and courage. It's about how people survive and how they flourish -- even against all odds. And it's about hope -- young people on the threshold of building a new life, and old people looking for a safe landing place. At the edge of a big transformation -- praying and fighting for a brighter dawn.

**We're standing at the edge of our own transformation right now.**

A year ago today, I asked you to fight alongside me when we launched our presidential exploratory committee. Since then, we've worked together to build this grassroots movement in every community in the country -- and we've stayed true to our values as we've done it.

**[I'm asking for your help again right now. Will you make a contribution of any amount before midnight tonight and help meet our critical end-of-year FEC goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bf4a/45c30650/1ea32382b/66fd2236/4264862764/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTJKRl9FT1FfU0NIX0VfMjAxOTEyMzFfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM2JF_EOQ_SCH_E_20191231_V1S3_P")**

>
We knew it wouldn't be easy -- the rich and powerful are doing whatever they can to stop our momentum -- but we're not slowing down now.

We're going to keep running this campaign the same way we have since day one -- meeting voters where they are, speaking with them about our plans for big, structural change, and giving them a reason to come out and vote.

This morning, I spoke at the historic Old South Meeting House in Boston about what's possible when we dream beyond the corruption we see and imagine a new future together. Realizing this dream is going to take hard work.

**I know in my heart that we'll be standing at the edge of a new democracy this time next year -- one that puts political and economic power in the hands of working people -- and getting there will take your help.** **[Please donate whatever you can before midnight tonight to help hit our goal before the final FEC deadline of 2019.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bf4a/45c30650/1ea32382b/66fd2236/4264862764/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTJKRl9FT1FfU0NIX0VfMjAxOTEyMzFfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM2JF_EOQ_SCH_E_20191231_V1S3_P")**

Happy New Year! Have a safe and happy night with the people you love, and let's make 2020 the best year yet.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Every time I watch it, Casablanca gives me hope. It's a story about love, loyalty, and courage. It's about how people survive and how they flourish -- even against all odds. And it's about hope -- young people on the threshold of building a new life, and old people looking for a safe landing place. At the edge of a big transformation -- praying and fighting for a brighter dawn. We're standing at the edge of our own transformation right now. A year ago today, I asked you to fight alongside me when we launched our presidential exploratory committee. Since then, we've worked together to build this grassroots movement in every community in the country -- and we've stayed true to our values as we've done it. name: Mike (cell)
subject: it's urgent now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
This is the last time I can reach out to you, so I'll get right to the point.
|
---

| | Hi all,

This is the last time I can reach out to you, so I'll get right to the point.

I just spoke with Nate, our finance director, and we're still $423 short of our goal.

If you can chip in before midnight, please do so. Here's the link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c1/33365068/4a60291e/3f8b9969/154360493/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191231pm_em_fr_all_eoy6_L1&amount=15")

I won't be in touch until after the new year, so I hope you're enjoying a safe and celebratory night with friends and family. Here's to winning in 2020!

Happy New Year!

Mike

(Sent from my Galaxy S8)
---
|
---

| | Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

| | I'm humbled by your support this year. From the energy at our campaign kick-off - the support on social media - the handshakes, hugs, kind words, and well wishes - to all the support I've seen all across the Commonwealth and country since. I'm grateful. We're looking to do big things in 2020 and I'm so glad that you'll be with us in this fight. **Before we close out the year, I'm asking for your help.** **[Will you contribute just $3 dollars so we can start off this year with momentum?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390d98/55b66746/2dd92584/80fbb20/4255653314/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-31-grateful&recurring=1&amount=3")** Your support fuels this campaign, and I could not be more appreciative. name: Team Canning

name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: Will it be YOU?
body:
Hi, I'm Tommy. Sara Gideon's Finance Director.

Hi, I'm Tommy. Sara Gideon's Finance Director.
And as you read this, I am parked at my computer hitting refresh, refresh, refresh over and over again. Because every time I do, another donation pops up and takes us one step closer to our goal.
And right now we are CLOSE to that goal. VERY close. So close that if you can add a donation right now, YOU could be the one who puts us over the top.
So what do you say? Use this link so I know it's you:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/FEC-Deadline](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3c/4bef7a87/6a144846/287f9f3d/1922664176/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191231-4-full")**
I hope you have a happy new year, and I look forward to one of the highlights being celebrating Sara Gideon's victory with you.
\- Tommy

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3c/4bef7a87/6a144846/287f9f3c/1922664176/VEsE/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3c/4bef7a87/6a144846/287f9f33/1922664176/VEsF/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Peter Khalil
subject: A Rabbit...
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporate interests is not radical
body: | | | | and a Hat --- --- **—** On the eve of this new decade, I am electrified. We are going to take our district back for the people. We are going to send a crystalline message that we are not just at the opening of a new year and a new decade: we are at the beginning of a new era in American politics. We are entering an era where the idea that every American can have real access to basic medical care is not radical. We are entering an era where the idea of mandating clean air, clean water, and an end to carbon emissions is not radical. We are entering an era where demanding that our politicians are not bought and paid for by corporate interests is not radical. This will be a long campaign. But in the end, we're going to pull a rabbit out of our hat. As a famous fictitious lawyer once said, "that's the secret of both trial law and life." Happy New Year. Peter --- Help us afford the rabbit and the hat by [chipping in whatever you can]( "chipping in whatever you can") on this last day of the fundraising quarter! --- | [Donate](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYN6pl0-2FWBthAfFjKtIUkeW8ja6P0pE-2BHZzPxW9-2FjzG-2BPHkAtOJ3eORenM7dcA5JGIAcI2j9XeuQNnqgyj2wyp5SWUat0dl3dlyS3nVI4ybejM_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxKBoOHmDC32nTm02mRU01Rd-2BC-2BtZR6S4f1RTj2E-2BDkec6WzAMWguq5iOTujoPdNqRi-2F-2BYbq6wFVUOK9ZR-2BL-2BoxsMMk75lkhUdXD-2BIUy-2F6LDn1BKXbVvLv2LVAW7W0mqI6OIReNN-2BsNdGiy8tcete-2F6A-2B60Ynwhtb5aN0VOmLJ0CEn00AmwJbrrLtL-2BVwtXlyMoLNMChQijQ-2FUmoT0rsa-2BX2aVTqoXjkdasR1pC5aYI8bd0DBVpnDbTdxBgLNPbaeYQnj7gl54NX4aKpnY-2FzErgYhV-2BIGipmcmiEr6jx-2FWkQAn46It5o-2BH-2BWMMgiEHBlbWQDl1jKcs0CF1Vd1LLhdq-2Fe7BFRHYX1syKXnbEnZL0Dgy1zN0jHVG1lKr-2F6sg-2BWRZRQdpjqmhHh7BI30EhqDCSbVn1KOfu9hBMwCvYgopTmBf2Cmyhpbd8t-2B0-2Fq6Tw08g78A5e7WYEfWZMEqN6Z1PGvY5sA5tnUMhYrvc1GgbxEY-2FF-2FdkA0liQLamWMyoCPZ1MeySRi7GEC-2BVhz3CRfRv0Q-3D-3D) --- Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil --- [Unsubscribe]( https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/unsubscribe?upn=enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxKBoOHmDC32nTm02mRU01Rd-2BC-2BtZR6S4f1RTj2E-2BDkec6WzAMWguq5iOTujoPdNqRi-2F-2BYbq6wFVUOK9ZR-2BL-2BoxsMMk75lkhUdXD-2BIUy-2F6LDn1BKXbVvLv2LVAW7W0mqI6OIReNN-2BsNdGiy8tcete-2F6A-2B60Ynwhtb5aN0VOmLJ0CEn00AmwJbrrLtL-2BVwtXlyMoLNMChQijQ-2FUmoT0rsa-2BX2aVTqoXjkdasR1pC5aYI8bd0DBVpnDbTdxBgLNPbaeYQnj7gl54NX4aKpnY-2FzErgYhV-2BIGipmcmiEr6jx-2FWkQAn46It5o-2BH-2BWMMgiEHBlbWQDl1jKcs0CF1Vd1LLhdq-2Fdh4sUU5J8SvaNEd9hl44kEoSo6BRUHe38Nz2xrEAaCEItoMIph5r-2FOfRKWBmA3HKfpozwsOLg93Hx-2F46TiejWDZwVWORxGbplkiojS9jA8FQOG1zLSEapvH6F1Z-2BVEVmQKgFAuidSypLB0PRzxGzF07fEUSskbQbwrUXOmq6Sk3P1siBJTuQfXyUO-2BqzjrC-2Fg-3D-3D )

name: Tina Smith
subject: New Year's Eve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
At midnight, the ball will drop and we'll ring in the new year. Usually, this calls for a celebration -- but not this time.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191231-final?refcode=em191231-final&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team -- I'm keeping this one incredibly short and sweet. My team and I are facing a unique challenge, and I figured the best thing to do was just tell you about it:

At midnight, the ball will drop and we'll ring in the new year. Usually, this calls for a celebration -- but not this time. There's something else happening at midnight: **our team will be closing the books on our most important FEC fundraising deadline so far.**

I know, the timing is a challenge. But whether or not we reach this goal will determine the resources we can muster to hire more staff and enact our plan to save Minnesota's Senate seat.

This deadline falls on one of the most difficult times for fundraising, and I'm worried we won't reach our 2019 goal before the clock runs out. But we simply cannot afford to fall short.

**So, I'm trying to raise what I can before midnight, and I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to donate anything you can right now. I know it's sort of an unusual request to drop in your inbox on New Year's Eve, but it's really important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191231-final?refcode=em191231-final&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

clean_body: At midnight, the ball will drop and we'll ring in the new year. Usually, this calls for a celebration -- but not this time. | "" Team -- I'm keeping this one incredibly short and sweet. My team and I are facing a unique challenge, and I figured the best thing to do was just tell you about it: At midnight, the ball will drop and we'll ring in the new year. Usually, this calls for a celebration -- but not this time. There's something else happening at midnight: our team will be closing the books on our most important FEC fundraising deadline so far. I know, the timing is a challenge. But whether or not we reach this goal will determine the resources we can muster to hire more staff and enact our plan to save Minnesota's Senate seat. This deadline falls on one of the most difficult times for fundraising, and I'm worried we won't reach our 2019 goal before the clock runs out. But we simply cannot afford to fall short. So, I'm trying to raise what I can before midnight, and I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to donate anything you can right now. I know it's sort of an unusual request to drop in your inbox on New Year's Eve, but it's really important. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Hoping I can count on you. Happy New Year! -- Tina

name: MJ Hegar
subject: I had to reach out one more time -- we can't fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I've had a wonderful holiday season with my family, and I hope you have too. I couldn't be more excited to ring in the new year with my family. But my team and I have work to do first, because our FEC

---
| | Peter -- did you see my message?

I didn't want to email you again tonight, but our last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2019 (and the end of the last full fundraising quarter before our primary) is just hours away. We are _so close_ to our must-hit goal -- just $1,391 left to go. **Now is not the time to fall short -- can I count on you to chip in?**

Here's a link so your donation counts right away to our goal: **[https://www.mjfortexas.com/PeterQuarterGoal](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907e7/7f51f7bc/4ace10ed/4ef03dd1/2769668483/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.4nd__716__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks for everything.

\-- MJ \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar**
Subject: my last email on this
> Y'all,
>
> I've had a wonderful holiday season with my family, and I hope you have too. I couldn't be more excited to ring in the new year. But my team and I have work to do first, because our FEC deadline is at **midnight**.
>
> How much we raise in 2019 will determine what kind of campaign we can run in 2020, and ultimately our chances of defeating Senator Cornyn next November.
>
> Our end-of-quarter deadline is just hours away, and we still haven't quite hit our goal. So before the ball drops, I'm asking all of our top supporters: **[Can I count on you to chip in by midnight?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907e7/7f51f7bc/4ace10ed/4ef03dd1/2769668483/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.4nd__716__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Every dollar you donate before midnight will be matched -- that means that your donation will go twice as far.
>
> Senator Cornyn's D.C. special interest pals are already pouring millions into this election -- but our campaign has something better: this grassroots team. **[Will you rush a donation now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907e7/7f51f7bc/4ace10ed/4ef03dd1/2769668483/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.4nd__716__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
>
> Thanks, gang. Your support is what keeps this campaign going.
>
> \-- MJ
---

|
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: In a moment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Every goal we reach is important, but hitting this one will directly impact the strength of our fight for the future of our country and everyone in it.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5397%2E377263%2E--im-D) Yang Gang --

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first donation to this campaign \-- but first I want to explain why this moment is so urgent.

11:59 PM ET is our final deadline of 2019, and it’s an end-of-quarter FEC deadline. That means our numbers will go public for every other campaign, every media organization, and every voter to see.

**And, given the lack of polls, fundraising will be one of the key factors for everyone to know which campaigns are contenders.**

[This is the final time tonight I will make this personal ask of you: Can you make a contribution of $10 or as much as you can so we can hit this goal, put up the biggest number possible after midnight, and show everyone the passion we’re all fighting with? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21095?t=5&akid=5397%2E377263%2E--im-D) | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21095?t=6&akid=5397%2E377263%2E--im-D)
---
Every dollar you give goes directly into programs that help build this movement to compete in every early state, bring our message to a national audience, and help me travel across the country to talk to voters.

I’m so proud of what we’re fighting for together, Yang Gang. And how we’re doing it -- not with big checks from wealthy donors, but with grassroots contributions and people giving it all they can.

I can’t thank you enough,

-Andrew
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is 11:59 PM ET tonight, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21095?t=7&akid=5397%2E377263%2E--im-D)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5397%2E377263%2E--im-D) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5397%2E377263%2E--im-D) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Final Goal
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhldkkdy-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

I know I’ve been emailing you a lot lately, but this is perhaps the most important one yet...

When the clock strikes midnight on the night of New Year’s Eve, we will either succeed or fail.

I’m talking about our End of Month, End of Quarter, AND End of Year deadlines... Yes, all three.

There is so much at stake in the new year... I’m fighting to make sure our conservative agenda is STRONG and our president is RE-ELECTED. But with the radical left more fired up than any point in recent memory, we’re going to face an uphill battle.

That’s why we NEED to start 2020 strong, by hitting ALL of our goals. Will you chip in?

END OF MONTH FUND [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20191230_eoyha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2] END OF QUARTER FUND [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20191230_eoyha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2] END OF YEAR FUND [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20191230_eoyha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2]

When the clock strikes 12, it will all be over.

We need to hit our goals before then, so my team will RUSH your donation to be processed in time... Can I count on you to chip in?

There’s no time to waste, friend. Please, take a moment out of your day to protect what we all hold dear.

Can I count on you to chip in now?

–Steve Chabot

name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljvn-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Peter, I hope you are enjoying the Christmas season and are having a safe and happy New Year’s eve. But before the festivities really get going, I was hoping I could count on your help one more time this year. **We have a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.** And the media and radical Democrats are looking for any signs of weakness to show vulnerabilities heading into 2020. It is critically important for us to have a strong showing. It will send them the message that we aren’t backing down in defense of President Trump and prepared to fight and win next year. **Please just take a moment to donate online today:** **[www.mikebraunforindiana.com/donate](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljvn-kujulhlke-j/)** **Your help before midnight is critically important. Please donate any amount you can here:[ www.mikebraunforindiana.com/donate](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljvn-kujulhlke-t/)** Thanks again for your steadfast support. Sincerely, Senator Mike Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhljvn-kujulhlke-i/) |

name: Cory Booker
subject: Before the confetti fills the room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Friend, this is my final ask of 2019.
After an extraordinary year traveling across America, hearing directly from voters and caucus-goers, we're nearing the final moments of this year.
Reflecting back on all we've accomplished together has excited me for what's to come in 2020. I'm so thankful to you and the rest of this grassroots community for standing with me and fighting by my side.
I'm ready to take on Donald Trump in the new year, and I'm hoping you can help ensure we're fully equipped to do that.
The end-of-year deadline is tonight at midnight, and this is the most important goal our campaign has faced to date. Before the ball drops tonight, can you make your first donation?
**Here 's a link: **[****ht** tps://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_CB_20191231-fr-CB-EM4-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Happy New Year, friend.
I know this will be our year,
Cory
| Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f53/5fca0d19/7b1dcead/291cc315/2986775438/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f53/5fca0d19/7b1dcead/291cc314/2986775438/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f53/5fca0d19/7b1dcead/291cc313/2986775438/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f53/5fca0d19/7b1dcead/291cc312/2986775438/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f53/5fca0d19/7b1dcead/291cc311/2986775438/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f53/5fca0d19/7b1dcead/291cc315/2986775438/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Michael's iPhone
subject: not much time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Team, this is the last time I'll reach out before the New Year.

Tonight's crucial end-of-year fundraising deadline is closing in. We've almost met our goal, but it's going to be close.

If we get a surge of grassroots support, we'll get there.

[That's why I'm asking: Will you rush a contribution of any size to our campaign before midnight tonight to close the gap?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8a1/134673f2/8ab28b8/699769ad/3790605880/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B3_123119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thanks for being a part of this team,

Michael

Sent from Michael's iPhone

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: counting on you as we count down to 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, **Thank you so much for everything you 've done for this campaign **\-- I can't thank you enough for your support. As the year comes to a close, I've been reflecting on what it has meant to have you on my team for this incredible journey together. **When I announced this campaign, I knew the odds were against us. ** I didn't have a massive email list or millions in the bank to transfer over to my campaign account. I knew I didn't have billions in my own bank to fund this campaign myself. We were building from scratch. **But because of you, the collective hard work of thousands of volunteers, and the dedication of everyone on our team - we 're building something truly remarkable. ** [**Donate >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc972/3eb3e2fc/6a6ac896/744edb78/1200788772/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Donate+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all")
**We 're running a different kind of campaign that many wouldn't think possible.** Our campaign has been bold, standing up for the most vulnerable people and telling the truths others won't. As we begin 2020, there are still hundreds of thousands of people sleeping on the streets. There are still far too many subjected to police brutality. There are still families subjected to Trump's cruel cuts to food assistance, and immigrants subjected to his immigration agenda. There are still billionaires reaping the benefits of his tax scam while families struggle to pay rent or cover health care costs. That's why this campaign has been about lifting up the voices of marginalized communities and proposing real solutions to fix our greatest problems. We can tackle the housing crisis, we can expand SNAP benefits to make sure families have enough to eat. We can end Trump's cruelty, reform our immigration system, and ensure every student has access to higher education or a good job. **We can build the smartest, healthiest, fairest, and most prosperous nation on earth.** We can make this country better than it has ever been, but we can't do it if we're too afraid to do big things, and we can't do it by leaving people behind. [If you share our vision for building a nation where everyone counts -- if you agree we need every American off the bench to win in 2020, give right now to help us start the New Year with the resources we need to win. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc972/3eb3e2fc/6a6ac896/744edb67/1200788772/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A | | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc972/3eb3e2fc/6a6ac896/744edb6d/1200788772/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc972/3eb3e2fc/6a6ac896/744edb6c/1200788772/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc972/3eb3e2fc/6a6ac896/744edb6b/1200788772/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro_=28sent_from_my_iPhone=29?=
subject: My last ask of the year...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, I just got off the phone with my Finance Director, Joey Czajkowski, who gave me an update on how close we are to our goal. **We are still $7,897 away from our hitting our critical end of year fundraising goal.** If we don't hit this tonight, we may not be able to fully fund our program in Iowa and pay for the TV, radio and digital ads we need to get on the air to win. [Help me fight back -- can you donate $15, $25, $50 or whatever you can give right now? >](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc973/3eb3e2fc/6a6fd353/744edbef/2412343630/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-finalstretch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Help+me+fight+back++can+you+donate+15+25&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all") With deep gratitude, \-- Julian _Sent from my iPhone_

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc973/3eb3e2fc/6a6fd353/744edbee/2412343630/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all")

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc973/3eb3e2fc/6a6fd353/744edbeb/2412343630/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc973/3eb3e2fc/6a6fd353/744edbea/2412343630/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc973/3eb3e2fc/6a6fd353/744edbe9/2412343630/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b6_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Today is CRITICAL, Peter
body:
With Nancy Pelosi's impeachment hoax heading to the Senate, the stakes of the 2020 election just got even higher.

Peter,

Midnight not only marks the end of the year, it's the deadline for our most important fundraising quarter yet.

If you want a conservative fighter in the Senate who will stand with President Trump, I'm counting on your support right now. Can you chip-in before midnight? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM]

DEADLINE: TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT!

CHIP-IN $25 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM]

CHIP-IN $50 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM]

CHIP-IN $100 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?amount=100&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM]

CHIP-IN $250 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?amount=250&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM]

CHIP-IN ANOTHER AMOUNT RIGHT NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM]

With Nancy Pelosi's impeachment hoax heading to the Senate, the stakes of the 2020 election just got even higher. We need to send a message to the radical socialists that we're ready to defend President Trump and win big next year.

I'm honored to have President Trump's endorsement. With his support and yours, I know we can win big next year. Can you chip-in right now to help us win? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM]

Thank you for your support.

Bill Hagerty

Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN)

DONATE NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/eoq-dec?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=december%20EOM] Team Hagerty

name: Steve Chabot
subject: FW: Final Goal
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhlhijdy-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

Very sorry to email you twice in one day, but this is urgent.

I just heard from my team that we're only $2,500 away from our end of year deadline.

In these final hours of 2019, all I'm asking of you is to take one minute to help me reach my goals...

If everyone reading this email chips in just $1, we'll easily exceed it. Can I count on you to take action now?

We need to move quickly here, friend. This is our last chance to set the tone for 2020.

Steve Chabot

-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend,

I know I’ve been emailing you a lot lately, but this is perhaps the most important one yet...

When the clock strikes midnight on the night of New Year’s Eve, we will either succeed or fail.

I’m talking about our End of Month, End of Quarter, AND End of Year deadlines... Yes, all three.

There is so much at stake in the new year... I’m fighting to make sure our conservative agenda is STRONG and our president is RE-ELECTED. But with the radical left more fired up than any point in recent memory, we’re going to face an uphill battle.

That’s why we NEED to start 2020 strong, by hitting ALL of our goals. Will you chip in?

END OF MONTH FUND [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20191230_eoyha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2] END OF QUARTER FUND [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20191230_eoyha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2] END OF YEAR FUND [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_954253_20191230_eoyha1_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_2]

When the clock strikes 12, it will all be over.

We need to hit our goals before then, so my team will RUSH your donation to be processed in time... Can I count on you to chip in?

There’s no time to waste, friend. Please, take a moment out of your day to protect what we all hold dear.

Can I count on you to chip in now?

–Steve Chabot

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. Like https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jhlhijdy-kujkulhluu-f/ Tweet https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jhlhijdy-kujkulhluu-z/ Forward https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jhlhijdy-l-v Preferences https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jhlhijdy-961825B2-kujkulhluu-e | Unsubscribe https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jhlhijdy-kujkulhluu-s/

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: My 2020 Resolution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Happy New Year from me and my family to yours! As we look ahead to a busy
election year – we’re thinking of the great progress we’ve made and the...

Happy New Year from me and my family to yours!

As we look ahead to a busy election year – we’re thinking of the great
progress we’ve made and the change that still needs to happen here in the
Lehigh Valley.

Thanks to Republican policies over the last four years, taxpayers have more
money in their pockets, the unemployment rate is nearing historic lows, and
American jobs are staying in America. There’s a lot to celebrate!

But, there’s more work to be done.

This year, my resolution is to do everything I can for the citizens of PA’s
7th Congressional District, the rest of Pennsylvania, and our country. That
starts with talking with meeting, listening, and understanding the needs of
residents as well as promoting the ideas I have to fix the problems in our
district, and – with your help – earning the privilege of representing you in
Congress.

Here’s to a busy and productive 2020 – I look forward to working and fighting
for our community, our values, and our future!

Many blessings,

Lisa Scheller

clean_body: Happy New Year from me and my family to yours! As we look ahead to a busy election year – we’re thinking of the great progress we’ve made and the... Happy New Year from me and my family to yours! As we look ahead to a busy election year – we’re thinking of the great progress we’ve made and the change that still needs to happen here in the Lehigh Valley. Thanks to Republican policies over the last four years, taxpayers have more money in their pockets, the unemployment rate is nearing historic lows, and American jobs are staying in America. There’s a lot to celebrate! But, there’s more work to be done. This year, my resolution is to do everything I can for the citizens of PA’s 7th Congressional District, the rest of Pennsylvania, and our country. That starts with talking with meeting, listening, and understanding the needs of residents as well as promoting the ideas I have to fix the problems in our district, and – with your help – earning the privilege of representing you in Congress. Here’s to a busy and productive 2020 – I look forward to working and fighting for our community, our values, and our future! Many blessings, Lisa Scheller PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

name: Tom Steyer
subject: This campaign is my resolution.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend, This is the time of year when we re-evaluate where we’re going and make changes to our paths forward. Although 2019 held a lot of pain and righteous anger for so many in this country, I’m proud of what we accomplished. I’m proud of the message that we sent to the most lawless president in the history of the United States. At the beginning of every year, I take a moment to set my priorities. But this time, it feels a little different because I set my intentions for 2020 the moment I launched this campaign. Today, I’m recommitting myself to the promises I made to you last July — **to restore our communities and our planet with climate justice, to put power back in the hands of the people, to reform our broken system of government in Washington, and to never stay quiet in the face of blatant corruption.** I’m recommitting myself to this fight and the vision for America I know we can bring about together. I’m grateful you’re with me, and I wish you and your loved ones a warm, safe start to the new year. Gratefully yours,
---
---
Tom
---

clean_body: | | | | Friend, This is the time of year when we re-evaluate where we’re going and make changes to our paths forward. Although 2019 held a lot of pain and righteous anger for so many in this country, I’m proud of what we accomplished. I’m proud of the message that we sent to the most lawless president in the history of the United States. At the beginning of every year, I take a moment to set my priorities. But this time, it feels a little different because I set my intentions for 2020 the moment I launched this campaign. Today, I’m recommitting myself to the promises I made to you last July — to restore our communities and our planet with climate justice, to put power back in the hands of the people, to reform our broken system of government in Washington, and to never stay quiet in the face of blatant corruption. I’m recommitting myself to this fight and the vision for America I know we can bring about together. I’m grateful you’re with me, and I wish you and your loved ones a warm, safe start to the new year. Gratefully yours, Tom Thanks for your support, friend. We’re still looking for a few more donors from Pennsylvania to make sure that Tom is on the January debate stage. Team, We've spent this past year campaigning all over Texas's 22nd district. Now, as we head into another exciting year of meeting with voters, listening to their concerns and personal stories, and working to unite our communities, I want to make a New Year's resolution to you. So, this year, I resolve to do absolutely everything I can to win this race and fight for families like yours. **And I 'm looking to you, and the rest of Team Sri, to keep me accountable ([and keep us in this fight](https://act.myngp.com/el/zW3Q5yA60FJQRJWWq7FfLAN1zBmmc8QdV-0yC_j0G24=/exTGi_zqvVEnzdNnr3iGHnTB-ZewDKPfYoYSjpI1md4=?recurring=auto&amount=22&refcode=20200101email)). subject: Happy New Year! 48 days left.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're now 48 days away from the start of early voting, 62 days from the Texas primary, and 10 months from defeating Senator John Cornyn.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489061c/7f51f7bc/4ac0aa09/4ef03dc8/484609613/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Happy New Year, Peter!

We accomplished so much in 2019 thanks to your support: traveling more than 11,000 miles, meeting more than 10,000 Texans, and earning donations from more than 25,000 supporters **[(you can join them by making a donation here)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489061c/7f51f7bc/4ac0aa09/4ef03dcf/484609613/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-earlyvoting?refcode=email_20200101.1nd__710__&amount=10&recurring=true").**

I'm humbled and grateful for everything this team has done so far, but we've still got more work to do. **We 're now 48 days away from the start of early voting, 62 days from the Texas primary, and 10 months from defeating Senator John Cornyn.**

Thanks to our 25,000+ donors -- who have given an average online donation of just $21 -- we've been able to hire staff, run ads, and build a strong foundation for the campaign we'll need to defeat Sen. Cornyn. We're starting the year out right!

**But now that 2020 is here, we 're running out of time -- and we need you more than ever. So can I count on you to make your first* donation today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The Affordable Care Act has never been in this much danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The Affordable Care Act (ACA) is at risk of being torn up by the Trump administration after a federal appeals court ruled the individual mandate \-- the backbone of the law \-- unconstitutional. Trump immediately hailed the ruling as a victory for Americans, because he does not care about Americans not named Trump. The GOP has repeatedly tried to trash the ACA before going as far as shutting down the federal government in 2013 and trying to repeal it in 2017 with no replacement, but all of their efforts have failed when Americans made their voices heard and demanded it stay. But this lawsuit could gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions without taking the will of the people into account, so if you believe we need to protect healthcare \-- not let Trump and the courts strip it away from millions \-- we need you to make your voice heard again today: **[Demand Congress save the Affordable Care Act >>](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf3b/6e9863e8/179f53a2/1db04a85/3557735876/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/93Hu6k4u")** Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf3b/6e9863e8/179f53a2/1db04a8b/3557735876/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200101a.ND&refcode2=n7lAcRDd90iZmsxTWOYa")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: We're so close!
body:
Early voting starts February 18th.

Happy New Year Peter!
We hope you're energized after the holidays, because we have a lot of work to do.

We are 49 days away from the Democratic primary, which means it's more important than ever that we reach out to voters, and remind them of the importance of the March primaries. Part of our outreach and most of our funding revolves around sending mailers and paying for advertisements. Please donate $5 today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927) , so we can reach two new voters!
Donate $5 (http://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)
Early voting starts February 18th. It lasts until the 28th, and election day is March 3rd.
Volunteer
If you can't contribute money at the moment, consider volunteering with us (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927) . We need to knock on doors, call voters, and remind them of why Marc is the best choice for District 18.
Become a Volunteer (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)
Yard Signs
If you aren't able to donate or volunteer, you can still help us spread the word! We have plenty of yard signs ready to go on your lawn; simply reply to this email and let us know how many you want, and we can deliver or set them aside for you.
Policy Updates

Finally, we are excited to introduce our new policy director, Bill Brooker. Bill has been hard at work meticulously researching the district, and helping us update our policies to best fit the needs of our community. You can see his work here (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/issues/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927) .

Be sure to follow us on social media to stay current on Marc's work in the district, and learn more about the campaign. (https://www.facebook.com/marcfloresforcongress/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)
Contribute Here (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)

Express Donate: $5 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)

Express Donate: $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)

Express Donate: $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)

Or, donate another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?refcode=express_lane_other&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=f891a1bb3f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-f891a1bb3f-32267927)

It's time for the final push! Help us spread the word; share this email with friends and family, and tell them how we hope to make a difference. Have a very Happy New Year!

Sincerely,

Marc & The Marc Flores for Congress Team

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Here’s to a great 2020

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5405%2E377263%2E-4a_VQ) Yang Gang --

Holy Cow!

Not only did we hit our goal of raising $3 million last night, we blew right past it to raise $3.5 million well before the deadline. Then, the Yang Gang saw the time we had left before midnight and put us over $4 million!

The Yang Gang did what many people believed was impossible. We had a record-breaking fundraising quarter. And we did it the exact same way we always have -- by relying on a higher percentage of grassroots donors than any other campaign in this race.

Since this campaign began, you’ve stepped up with over one MILLION total contributions. That’s one million acts of hope for a better way of life and a mindset of abundance over scarcity.

**Thank you.**

Now, thanks to you, we’re turning our sights to the homestretch before voting begins in the early states -- Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada. We’re going to compete in all of them. And we’re going to win.

Yang Gang, this campaign would literally not exist without you. We’re incredibly grateful.

Onward,

-Andrew | **Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21106?t=5&akid=5405%2E377263%2E-4a_VQ)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5405%2E377263%2E-4a_VQ) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5405%2E377263%2E-4a_VQ) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I made the decision to run a campaign straight from the heart. And today, I am deeply grateful that so many of you have put your full hearts into this campaign, as well. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bf71/45c30650/1ebfc3966/66fdd482/709430733/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
A year ago, I got in the race for president.

I made the decision to run a campaign straight from the heart. And today, I am deeply grateful that so many of you have put your full hearts into this campaign, as well.

While on the road last week, I got to call supporters like Logan who chipped in $3, and Moniqua who chipped in $20. That's what this movement has always been about -- speaking with people from the heart about what brings them into this fight and giving people a reason to come out and vote. I'm grateful for grassroots donors who have made this all possible.

**We're going to spend these next few weeks and months building momentum the same way we always have -- one heartfelt conversation at a time. That's how we'll get this done.**

For everything you did last quarter and throughout 2019 to build this grassroots movement -- and for everything we'll do together in 2020 -- thank you. We're just getting started.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bf71/45c30650/1ebfc3966/66fdd485/709430733/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjA0Rl9UWUVfVFlFX0VfMjAyMDAxMDFfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN04F_TYE_TYE_E_20200101_V1S1_P")

name: Cory Booker
subject: I just want to say thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, we're ringing in 2020 with some good news. It's officially 2020, team! I hope you're enjoying the start of the new year with friends and family. Here on the campaign, we're ringing in 2020 with some good news. **I 'm proud to announce that we exceeded our $800,000 end-of-year goal.** Not only did we hit our goal, but these last three months are officially _our best fundraising quarter of the entire campaign_. This wouldn't have been possible without the support of you and thousands of others across this country believing in our movement to reignite our sense of common purpose and unite our deeply divided country. Because of this grassroots team, we're up on the air with a new TV ad in Iowa -- spreading our message to caucus-goers during this final stretch. I cannot thank you enough for getting us here. We've got quite a ride ahead of us, but there's no one else I'd rather be with on this journey. **This is the year we are going to defeat Donald Trump and take back our country.** Thank you again for everything. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200101_CB_20200101-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f59/5fca0d19/7b0b9835/291cc207/41138975/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f59/5fca0d19/7b0b9835/291cc206/41138975/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f59/5fca0d19/7b0b9835/291cc205/41138975/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f59/5fca0d19/7b0b9835/291cc204/41138975/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f59/5fca0d19/7b0b9835/291cc203/41138975/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f59/5fca0d19/7b0b9835/291cc207/41138975/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
clean_body: | | | | Team, we're ringing in 2020 with some good news. It's officially 2020, team! I hope you're enjoying the start of the new year with friends and family. Here on the campaign, we're ringing in 2020 with some good news. I 'm proud to announce that we exceeded our $800,000 end-of-year goal. Not only did we hit our goal, but these last three months are officially our best fundraising quarter of the entire campaign. This wouldn't have been possible without the support of you and thousands of others across this country believing in our movement to reignite our sense of common purpose and unite our deeply divided country. Because of this grassroots team, we're up on the air with a new TV ad in Iowa -- spreading our message to caucus-goers during this final stretch. I cannot thank you enough for getting us here. We've got quite a ride ahead of us, but there's no one else I'd rather be with on this journey. This is the year we are going to defeat Donald Trump and take back our country. Thank you again for everything. Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. name: Peggy Flanagan
subject: Thank you so much
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, I want to start off 2020 by saying thank you. Because of your support, we not only met our end-of-year budget targets, we exceeded them. We had a big year in 2019, filled with new beginnings and transitions, both in office and in our new marriage -- our kiddo even learned to ride a bike without training wheels! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EODXdzEssff64DuIepMxNMmoWRQVQ-cii95ZtGjA_bY=/eCtRm5N_0buQa1K-J-T_6w6uGnbDW9lCCEpJQE3Ft5g=?refcode=em200101&amount=25)
---
My friend,
I want to start off 2020 by saying thank you. Because of your support, we not only met our end-of-year budget targets, we exceeded them.
We had a big year in 2019, filled with new beginnings and transitions, both in office and in our new marriage -- our kiddo even learned to ride a bike without training wheels!

_Happy New Year from Peggy, Tom and Siobhan!_
I'm proud of what we accomplished together this year. Despite intense partisan opposition, we secured a budget deal that protects 1.2 million Minnesotans, including 600,000 children, from losing their health care and invests in children and families.
2020 will be filled with challenges and opportunities, but we know we can do great things if we work together as One Minnesota.
With hope for the new year,
Peggy Flanagan
|
---
|

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
---

P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104 United States

We cannot accept contributions from corporations or LLCs. We are prohibited by campaign finance law from accepting contributions from lobbyists and political committees during the regular legislative session. We are required to collect and report the employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per year.
