name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: 2020 Vision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, Today is a new day and the start of the next great chapter of our American story. **In 2020, we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity.** We can be the generation that sets a new course for our country. We can be the generation that creates a more just society. We can be the generation that builds a more inclusive nation. And yes, we will say adios to Donald Trump. **We need a bold vision for 2020 that puts people first, stands up for vulnerable people, and ensures that everyone counts.** An America that combats climate change and achieves universal health care. An America with a humane immigration agenda and a fair criminal justice system. An America where no matter your zip code or your background, you can reach your dreams. That's the America I believe we can be in 2020 and in the decade ahead. **So, it 's with hope and optimism for our 2020 vision that I wish you and your family a very Happy New Year!** Thank you for being a part of this journey. For the future, Julian [DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc975/3eb3e2fc/6a74d51e/744eda7c/2470615516/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b5_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=75&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc975/3eb3e2fc/6a74d51e/744eda7b/2470615516/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc975/3eb3e2fc/6a74d51e/744eda7a/2470615516/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc975/3eb3e2fc/6a74d51e/744eda79/2470615516/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc975/3eb3e2fc/6a74d51e/744eda78/2470615516/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc975/3eb3e2fc/6a74d51e/744eda67/2470615516/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc975/3eb3e2fc/6a74d51e/744eda66/2470615516/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20200101_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: An Incredible Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

When I announced for Congress in April, I had no idea how much support and encouragement I would get from folks like you! The kind words, offers to volunteer and financial contributions have been incredibly humbling and prove just how ready voters are to take back the 7th District.

Over the past 9 months, our campaign has been busy. We've raised more than $1 million, knocked on over 30,000 doors and hosted more than 20 well attended Meet & Greets or public events. Here are just a few of my favorite pictures from the trail so far.

And we couldn't have done any of it without supporters like you.

So from the bottom of my heart, I wish you a Happy New Year.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=2ca9cb6fe8bc4aef8a34d697ece0a5e0&_e=ZEjdibaaalBKmGuOHTo6a009hxr2HweHBldBGnd3pwJgvnw9uPpU6EUZzeyI2exa1dDMKzsgrJTD8R4GIcQh_WkimD2ygFBNRXEZ2kCn1QNBOOil5vvEnAqmctOVnXQ9OPsOBziSThN2wRd0vOr59O2wUc2CAeKPDvMI1tjaAyVrgue-CNdYg5sH3S03XdAoYdRGVU_jXSHRaUFpcnznEUQ-zP_xYysECVh1Gkez1y_cGg1FK9KN1v8tJ3z-5blVK7__w67LiqVgLi0Lrt_HAajbggvByFBfhZRGBq2Vlt4%3D)****

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Thank you!
body:
Just a short note to say THANK YOU and happy new year!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3f/4bef7a87/6a177f4e/287f9f15/4006432595/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
First and foremost, I want to say thank you. We asked a lot of you over the last few days of the year, and I am so thankful for your support of our campaign.
At some point in the near future, we will release our exact fundraising numbers for the quarter. But first, I want you to know that we reached every goal we set at the start of this campaign -- not just the amount of money we raised, but also the number of grassroots supporters who joined our team.
This is going to be a long and difficult campaign.
We're facing off not only against Susan Collins, but also against Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and virtually the entire Washington Republican establishment -- and no shortage of powerful special interests.
But what I have seen since we launched this campaign is that if we are willing to stand together, then we are going to win this race in November.
So thank you for your generosity -- I'm so glad to have you on this team.
Have a happy and healthy New Year,
Sara Gideon
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3f/4bef7a87/6a177f4e/287f9f14/4006432595/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon-2020?refcode=em200101-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3f/4bef7a87/6a177f4e/287f9ceb/4006432595/VEsF/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3f/4bef7a87/6a177f4e/287f9cea/4006432595/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e3f/4bef7a87/6a177f4e/287f9ce9/4006432595/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**
